name: Idea / improvement
about: Propose a new rule, response template, or compression tactic for STFU.md v0.14+
title: "[idea] <one-line summary>"

assignees: ''

## The idea

What rule, template, or tactic would you add to `STFU.md`?

## What it would solve

Which prompt-shape currently produces verbose / non-compliant output that this would fix? Reference a `BENCHMARKS.md` row if applicable.

## Predicted impact

Which agents would benefit? Estimated token savings or compliance improvement?

## Risk of regression

Could this rule make any *other* prompt-shape worse? Which?

## Draft text

If you have draft STFU.md wording, paste it here.
